candidates.why: The only explicit operating D&A row above financial lines. However, there is no selected COGS reference bucket and the statement is presented by nature rather than with a dedicated cost-of-sales line, so this row cannot be specifically tied to COGS for separate addition without risking misclassification.

variables.notes: No dedicated COGS row was selected in the earlier mapping, and the visible D&A line is a single operating-by-nature expense line rather than a COGS-specific D&A line. Conservatively do not add any COGS-related D&A separately.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A row above financial lines, presented separately at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows 'Compensation to Employees' and 'Other expenses'. Since the selected XSGA bucket intentionally excluded D&A, this row should be added separately later. It is also the summary D&A row, so it is preferred over any hypothetical components.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket consists of 'Compensation to Employees' and 'Other expenses'. 'Depreciation and amortisation' is shown as a separate operating expense line, not as a nested subcomponent of those selected rows, so it should be added separately to avoid understating operating overhead.
